title: Infinite Torch
description: An item that lets you place infinite torches
body:
Say goodbye to running out of torches while lighting up your world! The Infinite Torches mod adds three new, powerful items to Minecraft: the Infinite Torch, Infinite Redstone Torch, and Infinite Soul Torch. With these items, you can place torches forever without worrying about depleting your supply.

Features:

Infinite Torch: A basic torch that never runs out, perfect for lighting up your builds.
Infinite Redstone Torch: A never-ending redstone-powered light source for your redstone contraptions.
Infinite Soul Torch: A soul-lit torch for a spookier, ethereal vibe, that also never runs dry.
Crafting: Each infinite torch is crafted in a 3x3 crafting grid, using the regular torch of the same type in each slot. Just place the respective torch in every slot to get the infinite version!

Whether you're building, exploring, or experimenting with redstone, the Infinite Torches mod will make sure you're never left in the dark again!

![Infinite Redstone Torch Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/504e6805afadc8ac8d815bafdfedeb73a556e201.png)
![Infinite Soul Torch Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fb4578b1c8f4d95bc808b290408983c3f89e5ae.png)
